description_long: This cafe features a modern, minimalist rectangular structure with clean lines and a flat roof. The facade includes large glass sliding doors and windows, allowing natural light to flood the interior and providing visibility from the street. A small staircase leads to a raised section, possibly a rooftop terrace or service area, enclosed by a partial wall. The exterior is primarily finished in a light, neutral color, with accents of wood paneling and a stone or tile base at the entrance. The building appears compact, with no visible signage, awnings, or outdoor seating. The overall design emphasizes simplicity and functionality, suitable for an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, minimalist cafe with large glass doors, wood accents, and a flat roof, designed for urban environments. The structure is compact and clean-lined, with a neutral exterior and no visible signage or outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large glass sliding doors and windows, revealing a glimpse of the interior seating and counter area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall and the raised section with a staircase, with minimal architectural detailing.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the staircase, partial wall enclosure, and a wood-paneled accent along the side.
description_view_3: Side view with a single large window and wood paneling at the corner, as well as the stone or tile base at the entrance.
